scope: Phase 3 UMI - analysis assumptions for ONGEKI

requirements.tick_ge_resolution_ratio_notes: Warn when (tick >= resolution) / tick_total >= threshold. Used to detect incorrect resolution inference or malformed measure/tick positions.
requirements.tick_grid_warning_cap_notes: Maximum number of O_TICK_GRID_INCONSISTENT warnings emitted per validation run to avoid spam.
requirements.time_beats_monotonic_epsilon_notes: Epsilon used for time_beats monotonicity check: warn only if next_time_beats + epsilon < prev_time_beats.
requirements.timing_surface_only_requires_bpm_notes: When timing_surface_only, a positive bpm must be present.
requirements.forbid_density_fields_when_timing_surfac: When timing_surface_only, sections must not include density/coverage fields such as npb/nps/coverage.
